SAGAI · MAY 2026
సగాయి · Engagement · सगाई

दस साल का सफ़र, एक उम्र की शुरुआत।

We invite you to join us as we make our decade of love official over a weekend of warmth, laughter, and blessings!

you are woven
into our story

नक्शा-ए-जश्न  ·  the weekend  ·  వేడుకల పటం
Saturday · May 2
10 AM Onwards · Roll in anytime
WELCOME GATHERING · स्वागत · రండి! రండి! రండి!

The Gang's (Almost) All Here.

Zero agenda, maximum gupshup. Power up with chai and snacks. The weekend has officially begun!

Chai & Snacks Gupshup Mandatory
1 PM Afternoon · Until sundown
POOLSIDE AFTERNOON · पूलसाइड · గెద్దల్లో జలకాలు

Splash First. Questions Later.

Join the bride-to-be in the deep end — she lives there. Just hot tub, cold drinks, no thoughts.

Pool & Hot Tub Cold Drinks Swimwear & Coverups
4 PM Evening · Dress to Dazzle
DINNER PARTY · महफ़िल · తిండి & తందనాలు

She Drops the Beat.

Welcome to Jashn-e-Mohabbat. Drinks, dancing, games — and the groom's pick, biryani. Aur thodi si himmat.

North Indian Spread Madira & Sharbat Dress to Dazzle
Sunday · May 3
7 AM Onwards · Come Hungry
MORNING BREAKFAST · नाश्ता · వేడి వేడి టిఫిన్

Rise, Shine, Pet Puja.

The South has spoken — idli, dosa, filter coffee, and all the works. Roll in whenever you're ready. We saved you a plate.

Filter Coffee & Tea South Indian Spread Favourite Pyjamas
11 AM Ceremony · The Moment 💙
ENGAGEMENT · सगाई · పూజలు పునస్మారాలు

Where a Decade Becomes Forever.

The rings. The garlands. The beginning of our forever. A decade of love, one moment — gather close.

Ring Ceremony Garlands & Rituals Indian Formal
1 PM Afternoon · Eat Up
THE GRAND LUNCH · दावत · విందుభోజనాలు

Because Love Deserves a Feast.

One final spread. Linger a little longer. The table is full, so are the hearts.

Grand Spread Comfortable & Festive

Where to Rest

🏡
Come stay with us
Troubadour Farm · Woodinville
We have a few extra beds at the property. If you'd like one, reach out to Medha early — we'd love to have you close.
Reach Out

— or make yourself at home nearby —

Luxury
Willows Lodge
5 min · Woodinville
Boutique hotel with spa, beautiful grounds, and exceptional dining. Our top pick for a special stay.
View →
Boutique
Heathman Hotel
15 min · Kirkland
Stylish waterfront boutique in Kirkland with a great restaurant and a walkable neighbourhood.
View →
Mid-range
Hyatt House Kirkland
15 min · Kirkland
Spacious rooms and kitchen suites — ideal for families or those wanting a little extra room.
View →
Mid-range
Marriott Redmond
15 min · Redmond
Reliable and well-located in Redmond town centre. Easy access to the farm and Seattle.
View →
Budget
Courtyard Kirkland
15 min · Kirkland
Clean, comfortable, and easy on the wallet. A solid choice for a short stay.
View →
Flexible
Woodinville Airbnbs
5–10 min · Woodinville
Cozy homes for 2–8 people. Perfect for groups wanting their own space and kitchen.
